commentary_links.hebrew: וּלְאֵ֖לֶּה תִּטַּמָּ֑אוּ כׇּל־הַנֹּגֵ֥עַ בְּנִבְלָתָ֖ם יִטְמָ֥א עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃
commentary_links.english: And the following shall make you impure—whoever touches their carcasses shall be impure until evening,

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִ֕ישׁ כִּֽי־תֵצֵ֥א מִמֶּ֖נּוּ שִׁכְבַת־זָ֑רַע וְרָחַ֥ץ בַּמַּ֛יִם אֶת־כׇּל־בְּשָׂר֖וֹ וְטָמֵ֥א עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃
commentary_links.english: When a man has an emission of semen, he shall bathe his whole body in water and remain impure until evening.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְהַצָּר֜וּעַ אֲשֶׁר־בּ֣וֹ הַנֶּ֗גַע בְּגָדָ֞יו יִהְי֤וּ פְרֻמִים֙ וְרֹאשׁוֹ֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה פָר֔וּעַ וְעַל־שָׂפָ֖ם יַעְטֶ֑ה וְטָמֵ֥א <small>׀</small> טָמֵ֖א יִקְרָֽא׃
commentary_links.english: As for the person with a leprous affection: their clothes shall be rent, their head shall be left bare,fhead shall be left bare Or “hair shall be disheveled”; cf. 10.6. and their upper lip shall be covered over; and they shall call out, “Impure! Impure!”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: של זב מטמאה באונס &star מאי חומריה דמצורע

commentary_links.hebrew: צַ֚ו אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וִֽישַׁלְּחוּ֙ מִן־הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֔ה כׇּל־צָר֖וּעַ וְכׇל־זָ֑ב וְכֹ֖ל טָמֵ֥א לָנָֽפֶשׁ׃
commentary_links.english: Instruct the Israelites to remove from camp anyone with an eruption or a dischargeaan eruption or a discharge See Leviticus chapters 13 and 15, respectively. and anyone defiled by a corpse.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מן המחנה כל צרוע וכל זב וכל טמא לנפש
